title: grewia grevei
intro: Grewia grevei, also known as the Mayten, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Grewia grevei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Grewia grevei can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
